messages.number: This field must be a number.
messages.boolean: This field must be checked or unchecked.
messages.array: This field must be a list.
messages.minLength: This field must be at least {min} characters long.
messages.maxLength: This field must not exceed {max} characters.
messages.fixedLength: This field must be exactly {size} characters long.
messages.slug.regex: The slug may only contain lowercase letters, digits and dashes.
